caption: Figure 7. Estimated cumulative damage for impeller blades.
description: A bar chart showing the level of damage for single-frequence and multi-frequence across six impellers. The y-axis represents the level of damage from 0 to 0.3, and the x-axis represents the number of impellers from 1 to 6.

caption: Figure 8. Estimated residual life of impeller blades by the criterion of cracking.
description: A bar chart showing the resource in years for single-frequency and multi-frequency across six impellers based on the criterion of cracking. The y-axis represents resource in years from 0 to 8, and the x-axis represents the number of impellers from 1 to 6.

caption: Figure 9. Estimated residual life of impeller blades at the stage of crack development.
description: A bar chart showing the resource in years for single-frequence and multi-frequence across six impellers at the stage of crack development. The y-axis represents resource in years from 0 to 12, and the x-axis represents the number of impellers from 1 to 6.
